title: Kubernetes Control Plane (etcd, API Server, Scheduler)
description: Master the roles and interactions of etcd, API Server, and Scheduler within the Kubernetes Control Plane. Explain the 'Declarative Reconciliation Loop' to ensure desired state consistency across Kubernetes nodes.
objectives: Master the roles and interactions of etcd, API Server, and Scheduler within the Kubernetes Control Plane.
Explain the 'Declarative Reconciliation Loop' to ensure desired state consistency across Kubernetes nodes.
